title: BHPLTA integration — configurable club code and import parameters
description: The BHPLTA match card import system uses the club code 'STANN001' in multiple places. Make the club code configurable via environment variable and update the import UI to use it. Also update the nonce extraction and import scripts to read from configuration rather than requiring manual entry. The BHPLTA integration should work for any club that participates in the Brighton & Hove Parks League.
acceptance_criteria: Match card import UI pre-fills the club code from configuration
Nonce extraction uses configured club code by default
cmd/extract-nonce reads BHPLTA_CLUB_CODE from env if -club-code flag not provided
cmd/import-matchcards reads BHPLTA_CLUB_CODE from env if -club-code flag not provided
ImportConfig struct in matchcard_service.go defaults to env-configured club code
Admin match card import page shows the configured club code (editable for override)
All import scripts updated to use env var with flag override
Documentation references to STANN001 updated to use the env var

approach: 1. Add BHPLTA_CLUB_CODE to AppConfig (or read directly from env in services)
2. Update ImportConfig to default ClubCode from env
3. Update matchcard_importation.go handler to pre-fill club code from config
4. Update cmd/ utilities to read env var as default, allow flag override
6. Update documentation to explain the configuration
technical_notes.scope_note: This does NOT change the BHPLTA scraping logic itself — it just makes the club code configurable. The scraping still targets bhplta.org.uk and uses the same API. Different clubs would need their own club codes from the BHPLTA system.

testing_requirements: Import UI pre-fills configured club code
Nonce extraction works with BHPLTA_CLUB_CODE env var

context.user_story: As a deployer for another BHPLTA club, I want to configure my club's BHPLTA code once and have all import features use it automatically
